subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-27 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Nighttime afforded these ministers peace of mind, as they would be undisturbed by the chattering and clamouring of the people
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون شب از قیل و قال و آشوب و صدا آسوده بودند و فراغت بال داشتند هر شبی در محلّی مجتمع می‌شدند
subcodes.subjects: @consultation, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
